## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes with no errors
- [ ] Tested in dev server (`npm run dev`)
- [ ] Regression tested — existing behavior unaffected
- [ ] No console errors or warnings
- [ ] Screenshots attached (if UI change)
